def solve(nums)
  n = nums.length
  max_index = n - 1
  sieve = Array.new(max_index + 1, true)
  sieve[0] = false
  sieve[1] = false
  (2..Math.sqrt(max_index)).each do |i|
    if sieve[i]
      (i*i).upto(max_index) do |j|
        sieve[j] = false
      end
    end
  end
  sumA = 0
  sumB = 0
  nums.each_with_index do |num, i|
    if sieve[i]
      sumA += num
    else
      sumB += num
    end
  end
  (sumA - sumB).abs
end

Another possible problem: when the max_index is 2, the loop runs from 2 to sqrt(2) which is ~1.414. So the loop is 2..1.414, which is empty. So the code does not process i=2. But sieve[2] is true, which is correct.

So the code is correct.

Thus, the code should be as written above.

__data__.content:
```ruby
def solve(nums)
  n = nums.length
  max_index = n - 1
  sieve = Array.new(max_index + 1, true)
  sieve[0] = false
  sieve[1] = false
  (2..Math.sqrt(max_index)).each do |i|
    if sieve[i]
      (i*i).upto(max_index) do |j|
        sieve[j] = false
      end
    end
  end
  sumA = 0
  sumB = 0
  nums.each_with_index do |num, i|
    if sieve[i]
      sumA += num
    else
      sumB += num
    end
  end
  (sumA - sumB).abs
end
